---
id: create
title: "Create a risk limit"
description: "Creates an active per-book risk limit. The metric must be one of dv01, duration, vega, notional, market_value."
sidebar_label: "Create a risk limit"
hide_title: true
hide_table_of_contents: true
api: 
sidebar_class_name: "post api-method"
info_path: reference/api/trms-api
custom_edit_url: null
---

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Create a risk limit"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"post"}
  path={"/api/v1/risk-limits"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Creates an active per-book risk limit. The metric must be one of dv01, duration, vega, notional, market_value.

  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
